brief.speaker: carol
brief.text: Different shape this time. No tags, no messages. Just counts by the minute. Show me ten rows.

hints.text: Carol: 'That's more than ten. LIMIT 10 is already in the query.'
Carol: 'Empty result. The table is metrics.'
Carol: 'Query error. The table is metrics — four columns: minute, service, n, errors.'
Carol: 'FROM metrics. The table is called metrics.'

success.speaker: carol
success.text: Right. Minute, service, n, errors. Every minute, every service. That's what we have.
